name: hr-report-cli
description: Generate HR reports, summarise employee data from CSV files, and produce formatted output in PDF or Markdown.
author: ScripTron Community

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: generate | summarise | diff | onboarding

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: Input CSV file or directory of employee files

args_schema.name: format
args_schema.description: Output format: pdf | csv | markdown | html (default: pdf)
